title: GOOD: Header ipv6_addr.h provides fallback struct in6_addr when CONFIG_NET_IPV6 unavailable
description: ipv6_addr.h lines 35-47: When Zephyr networking is not enabled, defines its own compatible struct in6_addr. This allows the address utilities to be used in standalone mode (testing, non-networked builds). The conditional is clear and the comment explains the purpose.
